meaning: v.拉长,(使)伸长,延长adj.伸长的n.拉长,伸长
examples: Uvala is a large elongate sinkhole resulting from enlargement.
Cytyledons and future stalk called the hypocotyl elongate.
The extra length will help elongate a full face, making it appear more oval.
But fashion finds it hard to accommodate a shoe that doesn't elongate the female silhouette.
If the cycle continues to elongate past 2007, as it now looks like it will, I'm golden.
